No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly aims to '促進身心發展及培養終身休閒運動' (promote physical and mental development and cultivate lifelong leisure sports), directly contributing to Target 3.4 on promoting mental health and well-being through physical activity.

Quality Education.reason: As a required university physical education course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and teaches specific skills, promoting lifelong learning and a healthy lifestyle (Target 4.7). Model A's original score better reflects this educational value.
